title: Ellipsis, Substitution and Cohesion
description: Achieve native-level concision: understand when and how to omit predictable words (ellipsis), replace repeated elements with one/so/do so/neither/such (substitution), and use cohesive devices to link ideas smoothly across sentences.
sources: CEFR C2 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
M. A. K. Halliday and Ruqaiya Hasan, Cohesion in English (Longman, Cohesion chapter: ellipsis and substitution)
